overview: VASCUSCAN AI is a dark-themed medical monitoring dashboard for real-time cardiovascular analysis. It displays animated PPG and ECG waveforms, patient risk assessments, live vitals, AI feature analysis, and supports 7-step patient registration with full form validation.
features: Animated Canvas PPG waveform (cyan) and ECG waveform (green) with 60fps scrolling animation
Dark medical dashboard with 3-column layout: patient sidebar, waveform center, live vitals panel
Patient sidebar with medical history badges, risk score, blockage probability, AI confidence, and feature flags
Live vitals panel with 5 cards (Heart Rate, SpO2, BP, PTT, Perfusion Index) and +/- adjustment buttons
AI feature analysis grid showing 6 metrics with NORMAL/WARNING status badges
AI model status panel (CNN, LSTM, Sensor, Database) with accuracy percentage
Scan timer that counts up automatically with STOP SCAN toggle
7-step new patient registration wizard with full validation (blocking cholesterol check, age validation, BMI auto-calc)
Patient history page with scan timeline and PDF/CSV/JSON export
Zustand state management with localStorage persistence
